message:
feat: Implement real functionality for stub implementations

Replace placeholder comments with working implementations:

- socket.zig: Real poll() for hasData(), fcntl() for setInheritable()
- _random.zig: Full Xoshiro256 state get/set (4x64-bit state)
- getplatform.zig: Real uname() call for getOSRelease()
- signal.zig: POSIX sigtimedwait() for pause()
- contextvars.zig: Thread-local context with copy_context()
- operator.zig: Real slice concatenation with allocation
- mock.zig: MockValue equality comparison for assert_called_with()
- exceptions.zig: PyException_GetArgs/SetArgs with tuple handling
- obmalloc.zig: Proper realloc/free using std.c functions
- getpass.zig: Windows Console API for echo-less password input
- multiprocessing.zig: Condition variables for blocking Queue ops
- lambda.zig: Use actual element types for list/dict return inference

All implementations use POSIX/platform APIs where available with
appropriate fallbacks for cross-platform support.
